data.name: Furry Futanari Jigsaw 2
data.detailed_description:
is a puzzle game, in order to make the pictures restored.
But please remember, this game is aiming to make you relax and enjoy life.
So if you cannot get relaxed, you may try "help mode" to Complete Level.

  • Get involved with hot futanari in your intimate moments.
  • A game only for adults.
  • Relax with beautiful handmade illustrations and an exclusive and engaging soundtrack.
  • Features include zooming in on the full scene, showing full background image, shuffling the remaining pieces, hinting.
  • If you love hot futanari, play it!! ❤️ 🧩

data.short_description: Be a good girl or boy and have fun with this sexy futanari puzzle game.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 瑞典文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
